title: Tata Consultancy Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Tata Consultancy Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Tata Consultancy Services has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Consultancy Services:
Tata Consultancy Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services!
